# Site content (JSON)

Public-facing copy for the Who's to Say Foundation website lives here as JSON files.

**Do not edit HTML for routine copy changes** — edit the matching JSON file or use Decap CMS at `/admin/`.

Full documentation: [docs/CONTENT_EDITING.md](../docs/CONTENT_EDITING.md)

## Quick map

- `homepage.json` — homepage hero & featured section
- `programs-index.json` — programs landing page
- `programs/*.json` — one file per program detail page
- `contact.json` — contact page
- `faqs.json` — shared FAQ entries
- `creative-workshops.json` — public classes & pricing
- `support-coordinators.json` — coordinator reference copy
- `stories/*.json` — participant story copy
- `site.json` — org name, contact email/phone, donate link
